data.content: Implementation review rejected on 2026-03-11: bun run test still fails at src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts:551 — child?.parent is undefined instead of '8792'. Root cause: the implementation reads knot.aliases?.[0] (plural array from KnotRecord) and builds aliasToId from record.aliases, but the mock store uses alias (singular string from MockKnot interface at line 6). Since mock data has alias: 'brutus-8792.5' not aliases: ['brutus-8792.5'], record.aliases is undefined, the aliasToId map is empty, and parentFromHierarchicalAlias never receives a valid alias. Similarly, in buildBeatsForRepo the aliasToId loop reads record.aliases which is also undefined for mock records. Fix: either (a) update MockKnot to use aliases?: string[] and the test data to use aliases: ['brutus-8792.5'], or (b) normalize alias→aliases in toBeat/buildBeatsForRepo (e.g. read (knot as any).alias as fallback when knot.aliases is absent). The actual kno CLI output shape should be checked to determine which approach is correct.
